title: read_positions map stale after bootstrap; new chats miss read-position entries
description: In client_task.rs, read_positions is loaded once at bootstrap and never refreshed from SSE (documented lines 142-149). A Chat created after startup has no entry in read_positions. SelectChat and SendMessage call try_mark_read which silently skips on missing entries. The MarkRead handler retries once with a full reload but try_mark_read does not. Maintenance consequence: unread counts silently fail to update for newly-created chats until restart, generating user reports. handle_state_change does not handle ReadPosition state-change events; a contributor extending it must discover this gap from the staleness comment.
